title: Craft the Uncraftable!
description: Adds community-wanted recipes to the game.
body:
CRAFT THE UNCRAFTABLE!

This mod allows you to craft uncraftable items in minecraft that the community have been wanting for a long time! Current recipes added: - Saddle - Chain helmet - Chain chestplate - Chain leggings - Chain boots - Netherite sword - XP bottle Visit the gallery tab to view the recipes! This mod is only in beta stage. I plan to add a LOT of recipes in the future! Comment any suggestions for items/recipes! Please comment bugs below If you showcase the mod on social media please give credit to me for creating the mod thank you!
